title: Author Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in every <authors_dir>/<id>.md file

x-body-sections.description: Markdown body sections expected in every author file. Not frontmatter — extracted by ingest, never validated by JSON Schema.

## Notes.description: Free-form opinion or observations recorded verbatim from the user.

id.description: Snake_case ID used as the filename and in [[wikilinks]]

url.description: Author's homepage, blog, or profile URL

bio.description: One-sentence description of who they are

company.description: Organisation or company the author is affiliated with

expertise.description: [[wikilink]] references to concept IDs this author covers well

sources.description: [[wikilink]] references to source nodes from this author

verdict.description: User's overall recommendation — only set from explicit user opinion, never inferred
